decision-tree.root-question: Does the operation read data (no mutation, no save/update/delete/delay)?

branch.conclusion: Not a selector. Place in `services.py` (write path) per [[django-service-layer]]. Stop here.

branch.question: Is the query reused by more than one caller (view + task / view + admin / view + serializer-helper / view + management command)?
Does the query traverse related objects (FK / OneToOne / M2M / reverse FK)?

branch.conclusion: Inline is acceptable. If the call site grows complex, revisit — extract on the next change.
Extract into selector. Single caller plus relationships means future N+1 risk on the next caller addition — pay the small cost now.
Extract into `selectors.py`. Apply rules r1-r3 (kwarg-only, prefetch ownership, .exists). Add an N+1 test per r5.

example.trace: serializer iterates orders + items.product → q1=yes (read) → q2=yes (view + task) → extract via r2-prefetch-ownership
